titleStmt.title: SII 39.206: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 206. (A.R. No. 206 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of 100 paṇam for making offerings like vaḍai 24, jaggerry Pānagam, Paṉigāram etc., on the occasion of swinging festival in the temple. Signatories Kōyil-kēḻvisiyar, and Tirupputkuḻi priyaṉ are mentioned in the inscription. The donor was Narasammāḷ daughter of Tāttaiyangār of Kūram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cupāṉu varuṣam cittirai mātam 10 2 tiyati Akaram kūrattil tāttaiya
ṅkār kumāratti naracammāḷ tiruūñcal tirunāḷ Upaiya
ttukku Iṟṟai nāḷ kuṭutta ø100 Intappaṇam nūṟukkum viṟtirama Accu
ppaṇam patiṉeṭṭukkum tirunāḷ Ēḻukkum nāḷ Oṉṟukku vaṭai
yirupattunālum cukiyaṉ yirupattunālum pāṉakattukku vellam ku
ṟuṇiyum payaṟṟam tirupaṇiyārattukku payaṟu kuṟuṇiyum Amutu ceyyap paṇṇak kaṭavomākavum
Ittaṉmam cantirāttavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭavatākavum Ivai koyil keḻviciyar Eḻuttu Ivai tirupuṭkuḻippiriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
